requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radio Equipment Spurious Emissions (QSMO / QS Standards, ETSI-aligned)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC — 无线电设备杂散发射（QSMO/QS标准，ETSI对标）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC — 無線電設備雜散發射（QSMO/QS標準，ETSI對標）

summary.en: Qatar Standards (QS), administered by QSMO (Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology), align with international and GCC-harmonised technical standards for EMC. For radio equipment operating at 2.4 GHz (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth) and 5 GHz (Wi-Fi), spurious and out-of-band emission limits follow ETSI EN 300 328 and ETSI EN 301 893 as accepted by CRA for type approval submissions. Test reports demonstrating conformance to these emission limits from a CRA-accepted accredited laboratory must be submitted as part of the CRA type approval application. CE marking test reports to the same ETSI standards are not directly accepted as substitutes but may serve as a technical reference for a fresh CRA application.
summary.zh: 卡塔尔标准（QS）由卡塔尔标准与计量总局（QSMO）管理，与EMC的国际及GCC协调技术标准保持一致。对于在2.4 GHz（Wi-Fi/蓝牙）和5 GHz（Wi-Fi）频段工作的无线电设备，杂散及带外发射限值遵循CRA型号认证申请所认可的ETSI EN 300 328和ETSI EN 301 893。须向CRA提交经CRA认可的认可实验室证明符合上述发射限值的测试报告。相同ETSI标准下的CE标志测试报告不可直接替代，但可作为新CRA申请的技术参考。
summary.zht: 卡塔爾標準（QS）由卡塔爾標準與計量總局（QSMO）管理，與EMC的國際及GCC協調技術標準保持一致。對於在2.4 GHz（Wi-Fi/藍牙）和5 GHz（Wi-Fi）頻段工作的無線電設備，雜散及帶外發射限值遵循CRA型號認證申請所認可的ETSI EN 300 328和ETSI EN 301 893。須向CRA提交經CRA認可的認可實驗室證明符合上述發射限值的測試報告。相同ETSI標準下的CE標誌測試報告不可直接替代，但可作為新CRA申請的技術參考。

standards_or_laws: ETSI EN 300 328 v2.2.2 (2.4 GHz WLAN / BT spurious emissions)
ETSI EN 301 893 v2.1.1 (5 GHz WLAN spurious emissions)
ETSI EN 301 489-1 (common EMC requirements, radio equipment)
ETSI EN 301 489-17 (EMC for wideband data and RLAN)
Qatar Law No. 34 of 2006 on Telecommunications (CRA authority over spectrum and type approval)

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for radio equipment (including spurious emissions) is assessed under CCC and SRRC type approval processes. Relevant standards include GB 9254 (radiated and conducted emissions, aligned with CISPR 32) and SRRC radio type approval test specifications referencing YD/T series and GB standards for radio emission limits. Test reports are generated by CNAS-accredited laboratories.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电设备（含杂散发射）的EMC合规性通过CCC和SRRC型号认证流程评估。相关标准包括GB 9254（辐射和传导发射，与CISPR 32对标）以及SRRC无线电型号认证测试规范，引用YD/T系列和GB标准的无线电发射限值。测试报告由CNAS认可实验室出具。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電設備（含雜散發射）的EMC合規性通過CCC和SRRC型號認證流程評估。相關標準包括GB 9254（輻射和傳導發射，與CISPR 32對標）以及SRRC無線電型號認證測試規範，引用YD/T系列和GB標準的無線電發射限值。測試報告由CNAS認可實驗室出具。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 (Class B EMC emissions, aligned with CISPR 32)
GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)
SRRC type approval radio emission test specifications (YD/T series)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC and CCC test reports to GB standards are not directly accepted by CRA for Qatar type approval. CRA requires fresh test reports from a CRA-accepted accredited laboratory referencing ETSI EN 300 328 / EN 301 893 / EN 301 489 series standards. Although the underlying technical limits are similar or identical in many cases, the test reports and accreditation chain must be issued anew for the Qatar CRA application.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC和CCC基于GB标准的测试报告不被CRA直接接受用于卡塔尔型号认证。CRA要求提交经CRA认可的认可实验室参照ETSI EN 300 328/EN 301 893/EN 301 489系列标准出具的全新测试报告。尽管在许多情况下基础技术限值相似或相同，但测试报告和认可链须为卡塔尔CRA申请重新出具。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC和CCC基於GB標準的測試報告不被CRA直接接受用於卡塔爾型號認證。CRA要求提交經CRA認可的認可實驗室參照ETSI EN 300 328/EN 301 893/EN 301 489系列標準出具的全新測試報告。儘管在許多情況下基礎技術限值相似或相同，但測試報告和認可鏈須為卡塔爾CRA申請重新出具。

source.publisher: QSMO — Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Qatar requires EMC test reports to ETSI EN 300 328, EN 301 893, and EN 301 489 series submitted as part of the CRA type approval application. Chinese GB/SRRC test reports are not directly accepted. Fresh accredited-lab test reports referencing ETSI standards are required for each model.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卡塔尔要求提交符合ETSI EN 300 328、EN 301 893和EN 301 489系列的EMC测试报告，作为CRA型号认证申请的组成部分。中国GB/SRRC测试报告不被直接接受。每款产品均须提交引用ETSI标准的经认可实验室全新测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 卡塔爾要求提交符合ETSI EN 300 328、EN 301 893和EN 301 489系列的EMC測試報告，作為CRA型號認證申請的組成部分。中國GB/SRRC測試報告不被直接接受。每款產品均須提交引用ETSI標準的經認可實驗室全新測試報告。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — ICT Equipment Conducted / Radiated Emissions and Immunity (QSMO / CISPR-aligned)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC — 信息技术设备传导/辐射发射及抗扰度（QSMO/CISPR对标）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC — 資訊技術設備傳導/輻射發射及抗擾度（QSMO/CISPR對標）

summary.en: ICT and multimedia equipment (including wireless IoT devices with mains power input) sold in Qatar must meet conducted and radiated emission limits and immunity requirements aligned with CISPR 32 / IEC 61000-4 series as harmonised under QS standards. These requirements apply in addition to — and separately from — the radio type approval emission limits under CRA. Test reports to CISPR 32 for emissions and CISPR 35 / IEC 61000-4 series for immunity from a CRA-accepted or QSMO-accepted accredited laboratory are required. Immunity testing (ESD, RF immunity, EFT/burst, surge) is part of a complete EMC submission for mains-powered devices.
summary.zh: 在卡塔尔销售的ICT和多媒体设备（包括有市电输入的无线物联网设备）须符合按QS标准协调的CISPR 32/IEC 61000-4系列规定的传导和辐射发射限值及抗扰度要求。这些要求与CRA无线电型号认证发射限值并列且独立适用。须提交经CRA认可或QSMO认可的认可实验室出具的CISPR 32发射测试报告及CISPR 35/IEC 61000-4系列抗扰度测试报告。抗扰度测试（ESD、射频抗扰度、EFT/脉冲群、浪涌）是有市电供电设备完整EMC提交的组成部分。
summary.zht: 在卡塔爾銷售的ICT和多媒體設備（包括有市電輸入的無線物聯網設備）須符合按QS標準協調的CISPR 32/IEC 61000-4系列規定的傳導和輻射發射限值及抗擾度要求。這些要求與CRA無線電型號認證發射限值並列且獨立適用。須提交經CRA認可或QSMO認可的認可實驗室出具的CISPR 32發射測試報告及CISPR 35/IEC 61000-4系列抗擾度測試報告。抗擾度測試（ESD、射頻抗擾度、EFT/脈衝群、浪湧）是有市電供電裝置完整EMC提交的組成部分。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 32 Ed.3 (emissions from multimedia equipment, adopted as QS standard)
CISPR 35 Ed.2 (immunity of multimedia equipment)
IEC 61000-4-2 (ESD immunity)
IEC 61000-4-3 (radiated RF immunity)
IEC 61000-4-4 (EFT/burst immunity)
IEC 61000-4-5 (surge immunity)
IEC 61000-3-2 (harmonic current emissions)
IEC 61000-3-3 (voltage fluctuations)

summary.en: In China, conducted and radiated emissions for ICT equipment are governed by GB 9254 (aligned with CISPR 32). Immunity requirements are covered under GB/T 17626 series (aligned with IEC 61000-4 series). CCC certification (for products in the CCC catalogue) requires test reports against these GB standards from a CNAS-accredited laboratory.
summary.zh: 在中国，ICT设备的传导和辐射发射受GB 9254（与CISPR 32对标）约束。抗扰度要求受GB/T 17626系列（与IEC 61000-4系列对标）涵盖。CCC认证（CCC目录内产品）要求提交经CNAS认可实验室出具的上述GB标准测试报告。
summary.zht: 在中國，ICT設備的傳導和輻射發射受GB 9254（與CISPR 32對標）約束。抗擾度要求受GB/T 17626系列（與IEC 61000-4系列對標）涵蓋。CCC認證（CCC目錄內產品）要求提交經CNAS認可實驗室出具的上述GB標準測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 (Class B radiated and conducted emissions, aligned with CISPR 32)
GB/T 17626.2 (ESD, aligned with IEC 61000-4-2)
GB/T 17626.3 (radiated RF immunity, aligned with IEC 61000-4-3)
GB/T 17626.4 (EFT/burst, aligned with IEC 61000-4-4)
GB/T 17626.5 (surge, aligned with IEC 61000-4-5)
GB 17625.1 (harmonic current, aligned with IEC 61000-3-2)

gap.en: Chinese CCC and SRRC test reports referencing GB 9254 and GB/T 17626 series are not directly accepted by CRA or QSMO. Fresh test reports referencing the CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 / IEC 61000-4 series from a CRA- or QSMO-accepted accredited laboratory are required. The technical limits are largely aligned between Chinese GB and CISPR/IEC standards, but the accreditation chain and report format must be issued anew for the Qatar submission.
gap.zh: 引用GB 9254和GB/T 17626系列的中国CCC和SRRC测试报告不被CRA或QSMO直接接受。须提交由CRA或QSMO认可的认可实验室出具的引用CISPR 32/CISPR 35/IEC 61000-4系列的全新测试报告。中国GB标准与CISPR/IEC标准的技术限值基本一致，但认可链和报告格式须为卡塔尔提交重新出具。
gap.zht: 引用GB 9254和GB/T 17626系列的中國CCC和SRRC測試報告不被CRA或QSMO直接接受。須提交由CRA或QSMO認可的認可實驗室出具的引用CISPR 32/CISPR 35/IEC 61000-4系列的全新測試報告。中國GB標準與CISPR/IEC標準的技術限值基本一致，但認可鏈和報告格式須為卡塔爾提交重新出具。

source.publisher: QSMO — Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ICT and mains-powered wireless devices sold in Qatar require conducted/radiated emission and immunity test reports to CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 / IEC 61000-4 series under QSMO QS standards. Chinese CCC (GB 9254 / GB/T 17626) test reports are not directly accepted. Fresh accredited-lab reports to CISPR/IEC standards are required for each model.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在卡塔尔销售的ICT及有市电供电无线设备须提供符合QSMO QS标准的CISPR 32/CISPR 35/IEC 61000-4系列传导/辐射发射和抗扰度测试报告。中国CCC（GB 9254/GB/T 17626）测试报告不被直接接受。每款产品均须提交符合CISPR/IEC标准的经认可实验室全新测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在卡塔爾銷售的ICT及有市電供電無線裝置須提供符合QSMO QS標準的CISPR 32/CISPR 35/IEC 61000-4系列傳導/輻射發射和抗擾度測試報告。中國CCC（GB 9254/GB/T 17626）測試報告不被直接接受。每款產品均須提交符合CISPR/IEC標準的經認可實驗室全新測試報告。
